outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump threatens 'a whole civilization will die tonight' ahead of his Iran deadline
outlets.summary: Live coverage of Trump's escalating rhetoric as 8pm ET Hormuz deadline approaches. Russia/China veto UNSC resolution.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump warns 'a whole civilization will die tonight' if Iran fails to meet his deadline
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's civilizational threat language and congressional backlash from House Democrats demanding emergency recess recall.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran war threatens to escalate as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Live updates focusing on Trump's deadline enforcement. Hegseth promises 'most intense day' of strikes Tuesday.

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Trump ramps up ultimatum to Iran: 'A whole civilization will die'
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's deadline rhetoric. Op-ed critiques Pope Leo's 'flawed war doctrine.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 39 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 39 roundup. Iran's 10-point peace plan. Russia/China veto Hormuz. Human chains at power plants.

outlets.name: PBS
outlets.headline: Russia and China veto watered-down UN resolution aimed at reopening the Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: UNSC vote coverage. 11-2 vote. Bahrain-sponsored resolution killed by Russian and Chinese vetoes.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu confirms strikes on bridges, railways across Iran to thwart IRGC launcher capacity
outlets.summary: Netanyahu briefing on IDF infrastructure campaign. 8 bridge segments hit across Tehran, Karaj, Tabriz, Kashan, Qom.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: US, IDF strikes hit Iranian rail and Kharg Island; Israel faces ongoing missile attacks
outlets.summary: Liveblog covering Day 39. Mojtaba Khamenei incapacitated report. Iran fires BMs at Israel on Passover. UNSC veto.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran cuts all diplomatic and backchannel contact with US
outlets.summary: Tehran severs all communication with Washington. Comes after Trump's civilizational threat. Pakistan channel may continue.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Human chains form around power plants as Iranians defy Trump infrastructure threat
outlets.summary: Coverage of Iranian citizens forming human shields around power stations ahead of Trump's deadline to destroy infrastructure.
